compiled_state.title: RED test: FP rate tracker emits fallback-engaged marker in next minimal-tier event
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write `test_fp_rate_tracker_engages_fallback` BEFORE implementing the FP rate tracker.

Given: fp-rate-tracker.sh not yet implemented
When: test attempts to invoke `plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh`
Then: test fails RED (script absent)

## Test Approach
Given: fp-rate-tracker.sh absent
When: test checks for script and verifies fallback-engaged behavior
Then: RED failure until implementation

## Implementation Notes
Create `tests/scripts/test-fp-fallback-scope-contract.sh` that tests:
1. (RED until T10a) `plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh` exists and is executable
2. (RED until T10a) When invoked with `--ticket-id=X --fp-count=11 --total-events=100` (FP rate >10%):
   - Script exits 0
   - Stdout contains: `FALLBACK_ENGAGED: {"ticket_id": "X", "fp_rate": 0.11, "scope": "per_ticket", "new_events_only": true}`
3. (RED) When FP rate is 5% (≤10%): no FALLBACK_ENGAGED signal emitted
4. (RED) Per-ticket scope: fallback for ticket A does NOT affect ticket B queries

Update `.test-index`:
`plugins/dso/scripts/fp-rate-tracker.sh: tests/scripts/test-fp-fallback-scope-contract.sh [test_fp_rate_tracker_engages_fallback]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-fp-fallback-scope-contract.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present
  Verify: grep '\[test_fp_rate_tracker_engages_fallback\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test fails RED before T10 implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-fp-fallback-scope-contract.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
